name: 10L Int5-MLP + BigramHash(10240) + SWA(frac=0.4) + WD=0.04 Throughput Branch
blurb: Planned throughput-first branch built on the 2026-03-20 top record. Keeps mixed int5/int6 export, BigramHash(10240), SmearGate, WD=0.04, and SWA(frac=0.4). Same-folder 4xA100 ablation was negative for pre-projection RMSNorm, so the active path keeps USE_PREPROJ_RMSNORM=0 and prioritizes batch-token sweeps before revisiting that mechanism.
